title: AccountRow missing id field causes redundant DB queries
description: activitypub.rs AccountRow (line 65) does not include the account id. In profile_page (line 277+283) and featured (line 599+602), fetch_account is called first (proving the account exists), then a second query fetches just the id from the same table for the same username. In featured(), the result of fetch_account is even discarded (`let _ =`). Fix: add `id: i64` to AccountRow and the SELECT list in fetch_account, eliminating the redundant query in profile_page and featured. What goes wrong: two queries hit the same row per request—doubles SQLite latch acquisition for no new information.
